examples: He warned that the effects of any war would be incalculable.
Failure to address comprehensively the problem of greenhouse gas emissions, however, exposes all generations, present and future, to incalculable risks.
A failed Mexico would have incalculable consequences for America.
His impact is incalculable and his influence will continue to inspire generations to come.
The cost of a blowout in the Arctic, far from land, in frigid waters, is incalculable.
